concerns.text: FR-004 and US-2 require a direct comparison against the 'full AutoResearchClaw baseline agent'. T021b (Execute & Retrieve) is marked as failed/missing, and T022 (Merge logic) is marked as failed. Without a task to successfully retrieve and merge the external baseline results, the core comparative requirement cannot be executed.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) and Principle VII (Resource-Constrained Execution) mandate schema validation and fallback logging. T011b (generate failure_cases.json), T013b (compliance audit log), T015 (distilled_rule schema validation), and T024 (pivot_attempt schema validation) are marked as failed or missing artifacts. This leaves the project non-compliant with its own constitutional constraints.

Constitution Principle V (Versioning Discipline) requires `update_state.py` to update `state.yaml` with artifact hashes. T007 (Create update_state.py) and T008 (Create .gitignore) are marked as failed/missing. The project cannot track state changes or enforce data hygiene policies as mandated.

SC-001 (Time-to-Pivot test), SC-002 (Stratified Success Rates), and SC-004 (Error Taxonomy) require specific output files. T029a (time_diff_results.json), T029b (stratified_success_rates.csv), and T029c (final_report.md) are marked as rejected or missing. These success criteria are currently unmeasurable.

The plan structure implies unit tests for the rule engine (Phase N). T031 (Write test_rule_engine.py) is marked as rejected/missing. Without this, the 'Independent Test' for US-2 (validating rule matching logic) cannot be performed.
